log: --- Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 29 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 38/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 7 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 31/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster.
